title: [CI:DOCS] fix indentation for userns modes
body:
Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11364

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@giuseppe, could you repush?  The deadlock is hitting us again.

The auto options could also be indented to make it clear that they only belong to the auto keyword:

https://github.com/eriksjolund/podman/blob/fix_userns_doc/docs/source/markdown/podman-run.1.md#--usernsmode

Aha, I think the layout change was aiming to remove the outer bullet list (but forgot __keep-id__, __ns__ and __private__)

https://github.com/eriksjolund/podman/blob/fix_userns_doc_adjust_keep-id_ns_private/docs/source/markdown/podman-run.1.md#--usernsmode

My preference would be a two-level bullet list:

https://github.com/eriksjolund/podman/blob/fix_userns_doc/docs/source/markdown/podman-run.1.md#--usernsmode

or alternatively to lift out the inner bullet list (i.e. the auto options) and put it as a separate section after the section that lists all --userns options.

Something like this:
https://github.com/eriksjolund/podman/blob/fix_userns_doc_move_auto_option_documentation/docs/source/markdown/podman-run.1.md#--usernsmode
Test failures, have nothing to do with this PR. Forcing merge.
